steps.title: Identify the cause
steps.content: Switzerland lowered the voting age from 20 to 18. The next sentence says many people gained a new opportunity to participate in politics. The second event is a result of the first.

steps.title: Choose a result transition
steps.content: Choice A signals contrast, Choice C signals opposition, and Choice D signals similarity. None fits a consequence. The needed transition shows that expanded political participation followed from the lower voting age. The answer is B.
